Tracked by m4-proxy-test-env-and-runtime-stability-foundation and m3-onboarding-state-resume-and-tour-controls. Zero regressions from auth-payments-identity milestone work.

reviewsSummary.reviewMethod: direct-review-fallback — subagent spawning failed with bun-eval parsing errors (known issue per AGENTS.md)

featuresReviewed.highlights: Inline auth gate, multi-provider sign-in, wallet-to-company sync, stored wallet fallback for header consistency
Three-layer settlement architecture (validation, edge function, browser client), optimistic locking, 6-dimension economics validation
Placeholder wallet rejection, non-placeholder enforcement in both agent creation flows, identity section rendering
Protocol Labs agent_log.json envelope with run metadata, usage summary, and log_id traceability
5-step discover-plan-execute-verify-submit loop, issue linkage, activity events, approval lifecycle, shared ID coherence
Unified pre-action guardrail checkpoint, 5 rule kinds, budget snapshot, structured logging, pre-side-effect rejection

nonBlockingIssues.description: Step implementations (discover, plan, execute, verify) use simulated/placeholder logic rather than real LLM calls. This is appropriate for the mission's validation scope but should be noted for future real agent execution work.
Git repo root is the user home directory rather than the project directory, causing git operations to show unrelated files. Not a code issue.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that the budget system reads max_budget from agent_identities.manifest.compute_constraints.budget_usd (default $10). Workers building on the budget/guardrail system need to know this manifest path to configure agent budget limits correctly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature m2-budget-guardrails-and-transaction-safety introduced checkBudgetRemaining() which reads this path. The convention is not documented anywhere in the current library files.

validatorNotes: All test failures (12) are pre-existing and tracked by future milestone features. Subagent spawning failed with bun-eval errors (known AGENTS.md issue) — fell back to direct code review in the validator session. All 6 features reviewed have clean code, proper test coverage, correct security patterns, and follow existing codebase conventions.
